description:
Security review of the gates feature (parent: bl-c97d).

Focus areas:
- Can a malicious or buggy task file with crafted 'gates' links cause panics, infinite loops, or unbounded recursion in the dep/gate resolver?
- Does the 'bl close' gate check have any TOCTOU window where a child is closed concurrently while the parent is being closed?
- Lenient LinkType deserialization (Unknown(String)) — confirm the catch-all can't be abused to smuggle data into other fields or break round-trip serialization.
- Confirm gate enforcement is bypassed only through documented paths (no silent --force flag added without review).
title: Security audit: gates link type
